summary: Tested Kunden-Modul (v38) - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 18/18 pytest tests passed. Frontend CRUD, search, filters, detail view, VCF import button, and file upload area all functional.
seed_data_creation: Max Mustermann exists in module_kunden collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kunden-Modul fully tested and working. Backend: All CRUD endpoints (/api/modules/kunden/data), VCF import (/api/modules/kunden/import-vcf), file upload/delete, and export working. Frontend: Navigation via sidebar, customer list with Vorname/Nachname display, detail view expansion, create/edit modal with all fields (Anrede, Kundentyp, Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail, Telefon, Kategorien, Status, Adresse, Notizen, Dateien), search, category filter, status filter all working.

frontend_features.navigation: PASS - Kunden-Modul visible in sidebar and clickable
frontend_features.customer_list: PASS - Shows customers with Vorname Nachname format
frontend_features.detail_view: PASS - Expands to show Vorname/Nachname separately
frontend_features.create_modal: PASS - All fields present including Anrede, Kundentyp, Vorname*, Nachname*
frontend_features.status_filter: PASS - Filters by status with counts
frontend_features.file_upload_area: PASS - Drag & drop area present in modal
